# Archive

Latest


[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Policy Gradients: REINFORCE and Actor-Critic**\\
\\
RL Part 7: Learning the policy directly, from REINFORCE to actor-critic.\\
\\
\\
Jun 7\\
\\
\\
![Policy Gradients: REINFORCE and Actor-Critic](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/06/rl-cover.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-7/)[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Introduction to Deep RL and DQN**\\
\\
RL Part 6: From linear features to neural networks, and the engineering choices that makes deep value-based RL possible.\\
\\
\\
May 31\\
\\
\\
![Introduction to Deep RL and DQN](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/05/rl-cover-1-996e97d504e9f5b6d4180d6b8fc38ebf6cd85d325f885f59f07141ca4e59a2b1.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-6/)[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Function Approximation**\\
\\
RL Part 5: From tables to parameterized value functions.\\
\\
\\
May 24\\
\\
\\
![Function Approximation](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/05/rl-cover-2.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-5/)[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Model-Free Learning**\\
\\
RL Part 4: Learning value functions and policies without a model. Monte Carlo methods, TD(0), SARSA, Q-learning, and the bias-variance bridge between them.\\
\\
\\
May 17\\
\\
\\
![Model-Free Learning](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/05/rl-cover-1.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-4/)[Agents\\
\\
\\
**Hermes Agent Masterclass**\\
\\
Everything you need to understand and customize Hermes Agent.\\
\\
\\
\\
May 14\\
\\
\\
![Hermes Agent Masterclass](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/05/b526bcd4-4732-4c62-8372-826d45ed663a_722x511.webp)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/p/hermes-agent-masterclass/)[LLMs\\
\\
\\
**Speculative Decoding in LLMs**\\
\\
...explained with code and tradeoffs.\\
\\
\\
May 13\\
\\
\\
![Speculative Decoding in LLMs](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/06/speculative-decoding.jpg)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/p/speculative-decoding-in-llms/)[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Bellman Equations and Dynamic Programming**\\
\\
RL Part 3: Bellman expectation and optimality equations, policy iteration, value iteration, and why dynamic programming needs a model.\\
\\
\\
May 10\\
\\
\\
![Bellman Equations and Dynamic Programming](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/05/rl-cover.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-3/)[Reinforcement Learning Course\\
\\
\\
**Markov Decision Processes and Value Functions**\\
\\
RL Part 2: Markov decision processes, returns, policies, and value functions.\\
\\
\\
May 3\\
\\
\\
![Markov Decision Processes and Value Functions](https://storage.ghost.io/c/3f/df/3fdf6ed2-17ac-4b12-a693-8078bd13e748/content/images/size/w400/2026/04/rl-cover-1.png)](https://www.dailydoseofds.com/rl-course-part-2/)

A daily column with insights, observations, tutorials and best practices on python and data science. Read by industry professionals at big tech, startups, and engineering students.
